name: Besitos De Coco - Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the coconut open and grind the coconut without peeling.
2. Measure 3 cups of ground coconut and add the remaining ingredients: flour, egg yolks, brown sugar, salt, butter, and vanilla.
3. Mix all ingredients well until a dough forms.
4. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
5. Pinch off pieces of dough and form into balls.
6. Place the balls in the baking dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Makes about 24 macaroons.
